face.structure: oval with defined cheekbones, moderately narrow jawline, soft tapered chin

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a subtle downward tilt
eyes.color: piercing dark brown with a hint of amber specks

face.expression: neutral with a slight upward curl of lips, indicating mild curiosity

skin.rendering_notes: soft matte finish with gentle shading to suggest tension in focused expressions

hair.style: short and layered with a slight fringe
hair.flow: naturally straight with a gentle side-swept motion
details: slightly tousled at the top for volume

character.aura: subdued and enigmatic, with an undertone of calm vigilance

outfit.design: dark grey, simplistically functional with angular line accents
outfit.fit: snug, tailored perfectly for agile movement

composition.framing: mid-length portrait displaying the upper body
composition.pose: standing with crossed arms, weight subtly shifted to one side
composition.gesture: head slightly tilted, eyes focused towards a distant point

background.color_palette: shades of blue transitioning into deep purple and black
background.details: silhouette of tall buildings with scattered city lights
background.rules: keep the background muted to emphasize character focus
